name: AI Code Review
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for code review — bug detection, security analysis, refactoring suggestions

prod.note: ~1M tokens/day, full diff analysis per PR

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for high PR volume orgs

services.name: GitHub Actions
services.purpose: CI/CD runner for CodeQL analysis and LLM review orchestration

services.name: GitHub Advanced Security (CodeQL)
services.purpose: Static analysis — vulnerability detection, dependency scanning, secret scanning

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Review orchestration API — receives webhooks, coordinates CodeQL + LLM analysis

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Review history, finding patterns, false-positive tracking, reviewer learning

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: GitHub tokens, OpenAI API keys, webhook secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Review latency, token usage per PR, finding accuracy tracking

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for initial diff triage, escalate only complex files to GPT-4o — saves 70%
Only analyze changed files in the PR diff, not the entire codebase — reduces token usage dramatically
Cache CodeQL results per commit SHA — avoid re-scanning unchanged files on PR updates
Use GitHub Actions concurrency groups to prevent duplicate review runs on force-pushes
Implement false-positive feedback loop — learn from dismissed findings to improve future accuracy
Run CodeQL and LLM review in parallel — reduces total PR review time by 40%
